purpose: Defines the !toc slash command — fast searchable index over the project TOC with four sub-commands plus default keyword search. Sub-commands (exact-match parsing, case-sensitive, only triggered by these four names): (A) `depends-on {file}` — looks up imported_by in dep_graph.json, enriches with TOC summaries, errors with guidance if dep_graph absent; (B) `depended-by {file}` — looks up imports in dep_graph.json (reverse semantics: 'what does this file depend on'), enriches with fingerprints purpose+exports; (C) `cluster {keyword}` — finds keyword-matching core files in TOC then expands one level via dep_graph imports+imported_by, falls back to keyword-only when dep_graph absent; (D) `changes-since {git_ref}` — runs `git diff --name-only {git_ref}`, filters to TOC-indexed, dispatches READ-ONLY scan agents to produce current fingerprints, compares old vs new for PURPOSE/API/SIGNATURE/DEPENDENCY/complexity changes WITHOUT writing fingerprints.json (use !toc_update to persist). Default keyword search supports tag-only mode (#tag, #tag1 #tag2 AND, #tag query combo), general text matching against names/paths/summaries/tags/related (ranked: exact name > summary > tag > related). Always verifies candidates by reading actual files (50 lines), shows 1-hop Related Context per result. Read-only.
gotchas: Sub-command parsing is EXACT and case-sensitive — only the four defined names trigger sub-command mode. Partial matches (e.g., 'dependency') fall through to keyword search.

depended-by has confusing semantics: it returns what THIS file imports FROM (forward deps) — i.e., 'this file is depended on BY these other files'. depends-on returns reverse (importers of this file).

ALWAYS verify keyword-search candidates by reading the actual file (~50 lines) — prevents false positives from stale TOC entries. Dependency-graph results (depends-on/depended-by/cluster related) are NOT verified — graph is source of truth for imports.
changes-since is READ-ONLY — does NOT modify fingerprints.json or dep_graph.json. Tells user to run !toc_update to persist.
Tag-only mode: query starting with # OR containing #-prefixed terms. Multiple #tags use AND logic. Mixing #tag with non-tag terms further filters by text.
If dep_graph.json missing for sub-commands A/B: error with guidance (run !toc_generate). Do NOT fall back to keyword search.
If dep_graph.json missing for cluster (C): fall back to keyword-only with note suggesting !toc_generate.
If fingerprints.json missing for changes-since (D): report simplified file-change list without semantic analysis.
API CHANGE threshold (in changes-since): >50% of export names differ.
Limit Related Context to 3 per result — prioritize types/interfaces over tests, services over utilities. No recursion (1-hop only).
Prefer precision over recall — 2 correct results > 10 noisy results.
If ambiguous query, return multiple candidates and let user decide.
patterns: Multi-mode dispatch: sub-command (exact match) vs keyword search (fallback).
Layered enrichment: dep_graph → toc.md summaries → fingerprints.json purpose/exports.
Read-only semantic analysis (changes-since) parallel to write-back !toc_update.
Tag-prefix mode triggered by # in query.
conventions: Sub-command parsing: first arg only, case-sensitive, exact match.
Output structure varies per sub-command but always markdown.
Fall through to keyword search on non-match.
